title: RIOT Analyst Coverage and Price Target Assessments Q4 2025 - Q1 2026
text: Analyst coverage of RIOT Platforms has remained strong throughout 2025-2026, with the consensus rating characterized as Strong Buy based on aggregated analyst opinions from major investment banks. As of May 2026, 14-19 analysts covering the stock provided a median price target of approximately $25 per share, with an average price target of $25.79, representing estimated upside of 3-4% from trading levels near $16-17 per share in early May 2026. The analyst ratings were distributed as: 77.8% rated the stock as Strong Buy, 16.7% as Buy, and 5.5% as Hold. No analysts maintained Sell or Underperform ratings. Specific analyst actions in recent months included: H.C. Wainwright raised its price target to $25 from $23 with a Buy rating in May 2026. Northland Securities issued a Buy rating on the stock with a positive assessment of data center strategy. Roth Capital previously issued a $42 price target in September 2025, the highest on the Street. Compass Point issued the lowest price target of $13 in October 2024, prior to the AMD data center deal announcement. Analyst commentary emphasized the strategic importance of the AMD data center partnership as a earnings growth driver, with consensus that the transition to higher-margin infrastructure revenue addresses long-term profitability challenges inherent in commodity bitcoin mining.
